title: Define v2.5 governed allocation and policy evaluation layer
description: Add allocation planning, resource claim, policy evaluation, and workload-oriented metrics artifacts so AOF can explain and review why specific resources should be assigned before claiming autonomous runtime behavior.
triage_notes: v2.5 governed allocation layer now includes allocation-plan, policy-evaluation-report, resource-claim, workload-aware metrics, release-definition alignment, and green organization/runtime verification.
